response.justification: The candidate is an experienced, versatile engineer, but his profile does not match this role's core requirements. His C++ experience is limited to a short stint at National Instruments (~7 months in 2014–2015) and a university thesis project, far from the mandatory 5–10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development. His database experience centers on MongoDB and MySQL rather than SQL Server or Oracle, and he has no Fixed Income, derivatives, or capital-markets systems background — his closest exposure is a fintech startup (RIDE Capital) built on a Node.js/TypeScript stack.
strengths: Broad, senior-level engineering experience across web, embedded, and high-throughput low-latency systems
Strong software craftsmanship practices: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops, conference talks, and teaching
concerns: Minimal professional C++ experience (~7 months), far below the mandatory 5–10 years on Windows
No Fixed Income, derivatives, or capital-markets/investment-banking domain experience
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; recent stack (TypeScript/Node/DLang) diverges from role requirements

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and communication skills
